ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., stock ticker, cryptocurrency symbol) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, cryptocurrency, commodity) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candlestick_data" (
  "candlestick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candlestick data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being tracked */,
  "candle_date_time_kst" TEXT /* Date and time of the candlestick data point (KST timezone) */,
  "opening_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the instrument during the time period */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the instrument during the time period */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the instrument during the time period */,
  "trade_price" TEXT /* Trade price of the instrument during the time period */,
  "candle_acc_trade_price" TEXT /* Accumulated trade price of the instrument */,
  "candle_acc_trade_volume" TEXT /* Accumulated trade volume of the instrument */,
  "candlestick_pattern" TEXT /* Candlestick pattern (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "rsi" TEXT /* Relative strength index (RSI) of the instrument */,
  "moving_averages" TEXT /* Moving averages (e.g., 50-day, 200-day) of the instrument */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the instrument during the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candlestick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candlestick_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_books" (
  "order_book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order book data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being tracked */,
  "order_date_time_kst" TEXT /* Date and time of the order book data point (KST timezone) */,
  "bid_price" TEXT /* Bid price of the instrument */,
  "ask_price" TEXT /* Ask price of the instrument */,
  "bid_quantity" TEXT /* Bid quantity of the instrument */,
  "ask_quantity" TEXT /* Ask quantity of the instrument */,
  "liquidity" TEXT /* Liquidity of the instrument */,
  "spread" TEXT /* Spread of the instrument */,
  "slippage" TEXT /* Slippage of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_books_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being tracked */,
  "trade_date_time_kst" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade data point (KST timezone) */,
  "trade_price" TEXT /* Price of the trade */,
  "trade_quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., market order, limit order) */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Fee of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date_time_kst" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event (KST timezone) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_governance" (
  "data_governance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data governance policy */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being tracked */,
  "data_retention_policy" TEXT /* Data retention policy for the instrument */,
  "data_access_policy" TEXT /* Data access policy for the instrument */,
  "retention_period" TEXT /* Retention period for the instrument */,
  "acl" TEXT /* Access control list (ACL) for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_governance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_governance_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security measure */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being tracked */,
  "encryption_method" TEXT /* Encryption method used for the instrument */,
  "access_control_method" TEXT /* Access control method used for the instrument */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Encryption algorithm used for the instrument */,
  "access_control" TEXT /* Access control method used for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being tracked */,
  "audit_date_time_kst" TEXT /* Date and time of the audit event (KST timezone) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during the audit event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the audit event (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the audit event (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
